issues.detail: Instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.

scenarios.name: Scaffold tabs + dynamic post route with Expo Router
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses npx create-expo-app --template tabs, the app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx Tabs container, app/post/[slug].tsx with useLocalSearchParams, and Stack root layout exactly as documented; baseline scaffolds react-navigation manually and does not use Expo Router file-based routing or route groups.

scenarios.name: Ship an OTA bug fix and configure deep links
scenarios.rationale: Treatment runs eas update --branch production with the scheme set in app.json and notes the auto-URL mapping (myapp://post/hello-world) plus EAS Build/Submit commands from the skill; baseline references CodePush or generic OTA without the eas update --branch flag or scheme-based deep link auto-mapping.
